message:
feat(conformance): add profile parity conformance test suite

Add tests/conformance/profile_parity_conformance_test.c with 6 tests
exercising cross-profile semantic parity:
- JSON round-trip preserves non-profile fields across all 9 profiles
- BIN round-trip preserves non-profile fields across all 9 profiles
- Semantic eq detects profile-only differences
- Same-profile fixtures are semantically equivalent
- Cross-codec JSON↔BIN works for every profile
- Semantic key correctly includes profile (different profiles → different keys)

Conformance suite now has 3 programs, 15 test cases. bd-m89n closed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
